results.title: Drumcree: High Court orders scrutiny of Parades Commission determination in 'highly significant' development of long-running Portadown dispute
results.description: Portadown District LOL No 1 has welcomed “hugely significant” developments at the High Court on Friday after a judge ordered scrutiny of the Parades Commission’s determination in the long-running Drumcree parade dispute.

results.title: Morgan Stanley shifts to defensive European energy stocks, upgrades Galp
results.description: Morgan Stanley shifts to defensive European energy stocks, upgrades Galp

results.title: Govt to set up modern testing facilities for toy clusters to boost exports, global competitiveness: Piyush Goyal
results.description: Union Minister Piyush Goyal announces modern testing facilities for toy clusters to enhance quality, meet global standards, and boost exports.

results.title: Ethanol blending has strengthened India's energy security without hurting vehicle performance: Former IOCL Chairman
results.description: Former IOCL Chairman B Ashok says E20 fuel doesn’t damage engines or reduce mileage, saving India ₹1.9 lakh crore in oil imports and boosting farmer incomes.

results.title: Record Defence Exports Show Global Trust in Make in India: Rajnath Singh
results.description: Defence exports hit record Rs 38,000 crore, up 57 times from 2014. Rajnath Singh highlights Make in India success and India's rising global stature.
